data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the persona scenario.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aims to validate a specific persona scenario involving a customer mistakenly booking at their own location. However, there is no direct evidence provided that confirms the outcome of this scenario or how the system behaves in this context. The prior steps focus on customer sign-up and booking processes but do not address the specific scenario of a confused multi-biz user, leading to an inconclusive status regarding the validation of this exploratory step.
gaps: No evidence of the system's behavior when a customer books at their own location by mistake.
